use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADVANCED GASTROINTESTINAL STROMAL TUMOR IN PATIENTS PREVIOUSLY ADMINISTERED AT LEAST THREE TYROSINE KINASE INHIBITORS, WHERE ONE OF THE KINASE INHIBITORS IS IMATINIB
FOR THE TREATMENT OF ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER (ADHD)

indications.text:
Qelbree is indicated for the treatment of Attention-Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in adults and pediatric
patients 6 years and older.

Qelbree is indicated for the treatment of Attention-Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in adults and pediatric
patients 6 years and older.

Qelbree is indicated for the treatment of Attention-Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in pediatric patients 6
to 17 years of age.
